# Scenario: reasoning-midline-boundary refresh variant.
# Renders the finalized state from messages.json via /session/:id/message.

:session ses_midline_boundary
:directory /tmp/midline-boundary

:refresh reasoning-midline-boundary/messages.json

# --- Assertions ---

:assert-contains run the diagnostic
:assert-contains Thinking
:assert-contains state carefully
:assert-contains Here is the diagnostic summary
